A Tale of Two Timelines
The Chronos
Chronicles
Blackthorn, New England
"Time isn't broken.
It's bleeding."
Choose Your Timeline
1899
Elias Thorne
Scholar · Detective · Occultist
A reclusive investigator in fog-bound Blackthorn, he decodes what science cannot explain. When voices from an impossible future begin whispering through his phonograph, he must choose between reason — and the truth.
1999
Vivienne Harrow
Journalist · Investigator · Survivor
Sharp-tongued and relentless, she arrived in the abandoned town chasing a cold case. What she found was a letter addressed to her — written a century before she was born. Now she can't leave.
Each player chooses a different character. Share this page with your partner.
